_schema: Purchasable consumables. effect_type is a CLOSED enum, each mapped to exactly one existing modifier site: yield_mult -> field_yield_units (field key premium_applied); stress_protection -> tick_growth (field key tarped, absorbs ONE storm/drought hit then consumed); weed_protection -> tick_growth creep (field key weed_shielded, halves creep for the cycle); breakdown_chance_mult -> _breakdown_chance (equipment-wide while a kit is owned; a kit is consumed when a breakdown fires anyway). sold_at: market (Sandy) | dealer (Roy). Cash only — supplies are optional, the note is for production (Director ruling 2026-07-06). Numbers PLACEHOLDER pending economy re-derivation.

items.name: Premium fertilizer blend
items.blurb: Sandy swears by it. Sandy also sells it.

items.name: Row tarps
items.blurb: One storm's worth of not losing sleep.

items.name: Spare parts kit
items.blurb: The box you hope stays shut.
